command: cloudinary-safe-agent-cli --output json --plan-out plans/delete-folder.json operations admin folders-delete-folder --path-param folder=archive/old

before_state.reason: This Cloudinary write family does not yet capture the live resource state or create a provider backup before apply.

recovery.restore_note: This write path has not saved or recorded a Cloudinary backup before apply. Use explicit Cloudinary backup or restore endpoints only after a separate review.

verification_plan.notes: Apply must require explicit no-snapshot approval before Cloudinary credentials are used for the write and before Cloudinary HTTP until command-specific saved snapshot support is available.

post_apply_verification_plan.notes: The runner uses same-path GET read-back when available, otherwise it falls back to API success and Cloudinary identifiers when possible.
